occupation: Director of Business Development and Operations at Ocean Outdoor Nordics
summary:
Experienced Operating Officer/Manager and Board Member, with a demonstrated history from the media and marketing industry. Special fields; Operational and Sales Management, Business Intelligence, Yield Management, Programmatic Trade, Lifestyle Data processing, Audience Measurement, Communication Strategy and Media Buying.

I thrive in environments where I lead and coach other people and groups. Also rhetorically strong, analytic and always hungry for knowledge.

For me as a curios leader this is a useful saying; “In order for data to be useful it needs to be converted to insights. In order for insights to valuable they need to be turned into actions”.

Education from Bergh’s School of Communication and Styrelseakademin/Board Academy.

experiences.title: Director of Business Development and Operations
experiences.description: Responsible for the Media Sales Operation, including Trading, Business Development and Ad Operations.

experiences.title: Business Area Manager
experiences.description: Responsible for the business area Media Sales, including Sales Department, Business Development, ¨Trading, Partner Relations, Ad Operations and Marketing. Also a supporting role the Visual Arts Nordic subsidiaries.

experiences.title: Manager of Business Intelligence
experiences.description: Continued development and marketing of Visual Arts programmatic structure. Responsible for internal/external programmatic education and the “go to market plan” the first programmatic DOOH offer on the Nordic market. Initialized and project lead the incorporation of lifestyle data into Visual Arts offer. All inventory was equipped with lifestyle, behavioral and consumption data (Mosaic) in order to create enhance the insights about Visual Arts advertising audience. Also managed set ups for so-called Trigger data, that was included into the into the programmatic offer in order to optimize relevance for buyers. Represented Visual Art on the Technical Committee of Outdoor Impact. Outdoor Impact is industry body for OOH Media and supplies media buyers with an evaluation model and currency for buying OOH Media. Received the Visual Art “Knowledge” award in 2018.

experiences.title: Manager of Business Development
experiences.description: First responsibility at Visual Art was to set up the first programmatic structure for Digital Out of Home Media in the Nordics. Performed the initial status analysis, formulated demands, initialized a cooperation with AdTech Partner Adform, project lead the implementation of the whole structure. Also managed the setup of a process for Revenue and Yield Management. This came to deliver valuable   insights for the Sales Department, that could be broken down to daily actions.

experiences.title: Founder
experiences.description: After 20 years within large global corporations, I decided to try my entrepreneurial skills and founded Monkeywrench Consulting (MWC) in 2014. Since my professional background has consisted mainly of roles within Sales and Corporate Management, the business focus as a consultant was obvious – to share experiences with other leaders and entrepreneurs in order to hedge their investments in business development, sales and management. Since early on MWC has been consulted by companies and startup operations, in need of perspective on their business/sales strategies, management and projects related to business development. MWC often serves companies with a “health check” in order to identify core business, move non profitable areas and form strategies for business development. MWC has also been consulted on several occasion in different negotiations for media concessions. My industry background comes from the Out of Home Media industry, so I also run a specialist operation within this field - Nordic Out of Home (NOOH). NOOH delivers expertise in order to help companies maximize their investments in Out of Home Media. NOOH has been consulted by several clients throughout the Nordic region with documented extraordinary results. Lately NOOH has been exploring the possibility to bring the online structure for programmatic buying into the Out of Home industry. This has been done on a project basis, with the purpose to drive the Digital Out of Home industry to become more digital. The project is ongoing.

experiences.title: Nordic Managing Director
experiences.description: In 2007 I was appointed Managing Director of Kinetic Sweden, with the purpose to launch a Specialist operation within Out of Home Media. The launch was made in tight cooperation with GroupM Sweden and Kinetic International. Kinetic's core business is to service clients (media agencies and advertisers) with media insights, formulize strategies and execute a step by step campaign planning procedure, in order to optimize the clients OoH investments. In 2009 my responsibility expanded to a role as Nordic Managing Director when my commitment also came to include Kinetic Denmark. Through the hubs in Stockholm and Copenhagen we also operated on a  project basis in Norway and Finland. The Kinetic teams in Sweden and Denmark included 7 people, OoH Planners and Project Managers.

experiences.title: Sales Director
experiences.description: I managed a Sales Department consisting of 20 people and was responsible for all company revenue. Set up and implemented sales strategies within the company. Was a member of the companies Executive Board.

experiences.title: Sales Manager
experiences.description: I managed a Sales Group of 8 sales representatives. The group worked with national sales and was responsible for key clients. Member of Sales Executive Council

experiences.title: Account Manager Key Account
experiences.description: Managed 50 key accounts on Swe/Nordic level

education.field_of_study: Right focus on the board of privately owned corperations
education.description: A very useful education facilitated by StyrelseAkademien Stockholm. Browses through areas as the different corporate levels, legal responsibilities, recruiting of board members and obviously different ways to increase board efficiency. Highly recommended!

recommendations:
Tomas Larsson

As Managing Director of JCDecaux Sverige, I employed Anders in the early 1990's as Sales Representative. Anders progressed to Key Account Manager and subsequently to Sales Director.Anders combines great client services skills with thorough professionalism. He has the ability of building solid client relations while staying focused on business targets. I am very happy to recommend Anders for any leading position in media/marketing.

Luke Simmonds

I had the pleasure of working with Anders from 2008-2013 at GroupM. Anders was recruited to launch and manage Kinetic, an Out of Home specialist with the responsibility for the P&L, quarterly reporting and forecasting, recruitment, media owner relationships and the implementation of the daily operations.With his vast experience and knowledge of Out of Home Media, Anders was instrumental in the setup of Kinetic and the service provided to its Clients. He managed his team well and was highly appreciated by both colleagues and Clients.I enjoyed working with Anders immensely and valued his dedication and passion to the business.
